title: Stacking ΔG₃₇ is the #1 feature for TE silencing prediction across 4 of 5 tissues; evolutionary age ranks 10th–14th

subject.display: Migration cohort for 'Stacking ΔG₃₇ is the #1 feature for TE silencing prediction across 4 of 5 tissue'
subject.note: Inclusion predicates intentionally empty at migration time; the implicit member set is defined by the v1.1 premises. Re-author with explicit inclusion predicates to tighten the subject.

source.note: Per-tissue random-forest permutation-importance tables from exp03, one RF per tissue × silencing-state target. Staged from results/rf_importance_by_tissue.csv.

operations.note: Per-tissue argmax over the 64-feature importance column, returning the top-ranked feature name and its permutation-importance score.
Pull the rank of the evolutionary-age (divergence) feature per tissue from the full 64-feature importance order.
Indicator sum: number of tissues where stacking_dg37 is the top-ranked feature.

statistics.name: modal_top_feature_across_tissues
statistics.note: Categorical top-feature summary. Mode is stacking_dg37, with 4 of 5 tissues selecting it; the exception is H3K9me3-ESC where KRAB-ZnF motif recognition dominates over bulk physics.

statistics.name: min_rank_of_divergence_across_tissues
statistics.note: Lowest (best) rank of divergence across tissues. Full range across tissues is 10th–14th; pinning the best case here as the load-bearing conservative bound.

statistics.name: top_feature_by_tissue_labeled
statistics.note: LabeledValue[] encoding of the per-tissue modal feature as a binary indicator (1 = stacking_dg37, 0 = other). The H1_hESC exception is the H3K9me3 designed negative control.

inference.justification: Two conjuncts license the claim: (1) at least 4 of 5 tissues select stacking_dg37 as #1 confirms the biophysical-over-sequence-composition ranking is robust across tissues rather than idiosyncratic; (2) evolutionary age (divergence) ranks below the top-5 in every tissue, demonstrating that the material channel carries more silencing information than age does — the central claim against the naive CpG/age-driven expectation.
inference.failure_mode: If fewer than 4 tissues selected stacking_dg37, the modal-feature claim collapses to tissue-specific noise. If divergence ranked in the top 5 in any tissue, the biophysics-beats-age framing would need qualification to that specific tissue.

conclusion.assertion: Across 5 Roadmap tissues × 5 silencing-state targets, stacking ΔG₃₇ (thermodynamic stability) is the top-ranked permutation-importance feature in 4 of 5 tissues, with evolutionary-age (divergence) never ranking higher than 10th. DNA thermodynamic stability carries more TE-silencing information than age or sequence-composition features — a ranking that contradicts the naive CpG-density expectation and identifies the material channel as the dominant predictor.

scope.scale_note: Feature-ranking claim at the tissue-aggregate level. Per-TE importance contributions (SHAP) are a separate deferred fixture.

confidence.note: No significance test on the ranking — this is a descriptive ordering. A resampling bootstrap of top-feature identity is staged in RESULT.md § Caveats.

external_assumptions.statement: Permutation importance (ranger's `permutation` method) is a faithful ranking even in the presence of correlated features (stacking_dg37 correlates r=0.997 with gc_content genome-wide per Exp 01).
The 5-tissue panel is representative of the 15-Roadmap-epigenome universe for the purpose of this ranking claim.
